btc_swing.strategy_name: Van de Poppe + Tone Vays Combined BTC Swing Trading
btc_swing.philosophy: Van de Poppe provides the WHERE (Fibonacci levels + structure). Tone Vays provides the WHEN (TD Sequential exhaustion + MACD divergence). Combined = highest conviction entries.

ema_200.notes: Macro trend direction — above = bullish, below = bearish (Van de Poppe)

macd.notes: Momentum confirmation + divergence detection (Tone Vays). Do NOT modify defaults.

bollinger_bands.notes: Overextension gauge — price at/below lower BB adds conviction to buy setups (Tone Vays)

td_sequential.notes: Tom DeMark Sequential — buy/sell 9 and 13 counts for exhaustion timing. Use community script on TradingView. Primary signal generator (Tone Vays)

volume.notes: Confirm breakouts — breakout candle volume must exceed average

fibonacci.notes: Draw from swing low to swing high of most recent significant impulse (Van de Poppe)

timeframes.weekly: Macro trend direction, major Fibonacci levels, cycle analysis
timeframes.daily: Primary trade setup identification, EMA trend, RSI divergences
timeframes.1h: Precision entries within the 4H setup zone

workflow: 1. Weekly chart — confirm macro bias (above 200 EMA = bullish)
2. Daily chart — identify swing setup (retest, Fib retracement, divergence)
3. 4H chart — time the entry, wait for structure confirmation
4. 1H chart — fine-tune stop loss and entry

macro_bias.rule: Do NOT long against the daily 200 EMA

a_plus_ultimate.description: HIGHEST CONVICTION — All signals align (rare, 2-4x per year)
steps: Weekly TD Sequential buy 9 or 13 completes (Tone Vays)
Price is at Van de Poppe's golden pocket (0.618 Fibonacci retracement)
MACD histogram shows bullish divergence (Tone Vays)
Price at or below lower Bollinger Band (Tone Vays)
Price reclaiming the 21 or 55 EMA from below (Van de Poppe)
Daily chart confirms with bullish structure break / higher low forming (Van de Poppe)

golden_pocket_retracement.description: Buy the 0.618 Fibonacci retracement with momentum confirmation
steps: Identify most recent significant impulse move (swing low to swing high)
Draw Fibonacci retracement
Wait for price to pull back to 0.5–0.618 zone (Golden Pocket)
Look for confluence: horizontal S/R, EMA support, or TDST line at same level
MACD histogram curling up or showing divergence adds conviction
Enter at or near 0.618 with stop below 0.786

td_sequential_exhaustion.description: Tone Vays' primary setup — TD count exhaustion reversal
steps: TD Sequential completes a perfected buy 9 or buy 13 on weekly or 3-day chart
MACD histogram shows bullish divergence (price lower low, MACD higher low)
Price at or below lower Bollinger Band (overextended)
Wait for candle to CLOSE before entering — never enter mid-candle
Stop below the lowest low of the entire TD Sequential count

breakout_retest.description: Trade the retest after a range breakout (Van de Poppe)
steps: Identify consolidation range after an impulse move
Wait for breakout from range (strong candle close beyond)
Wait for retest of broken level (old resistance becomes support)
Enter on confirmed hold of the retest level
Volume: increasing on breakout, decreasing on retest = healthy

liquidity_grab.description: Stop hunt reversal at key levels
steps: Identify equal lows or obvious support with stops clustered below
Wait for price to wick below support (sweeping liquidity / Fair Value Gap fill)
Enter when price closes back above the support level
Best when combined with Fibonacci 0.618, TD buy count, or MACD divergence

confluence_checklist: TD Sequential buy 9 or 13 completing (Tone Vays — strongest signal)
Fibonacci level 0.5–0.618 golden pocket (Van de Poppe)
Price at/below lower Bollinger Band (Tone Vays)
EMA support — 21, 55, or 200 on relevant timeframe (Van de Poppe)
Market structure: higher low confirmed on 4H (Van de Poppe)
NEED AT LEAST 3 of these to enter

market_structure.uptrend: Higher highs and higher lows — enter on higher lows
market_structure.downtrend: Lower highs and lower lows — avoid longs or look for reversal
market_structure.break_of_structure: Price breaks previous swing high = bullish continuation, enter on retest
market_structure.change_of_character: First break of structure in opposite direction = early reversal signal
market_structure.range: Buy near range low, sell near range high. Above midpoint = bullish bias

liquidity.equal_highs: Sell-side liquidity pool — price likely sweeps before reversing
liquidity.equal_lows: Buy-side liquidity pool — price likely sweeps before reversing
liquidity.fair_value_gaps: 3-candle imbalance where candle 1 and 3 wicks don't overlap — price tends to fill

stop_loss.td_method: Below the lowest low of the entire TD Sequential count (Tone Vays)
stop_loss.rule: Use whichever stop is wider for more breathing room — but ensure R:R still meets minimum

invalidation: Price closes below 0.786 Fib on a daily candle (Van de Poppe)
TDST support level breaks on close (Tone Vays)
Break of market structure — lower low where higher low expected
Loss of 200 EMA on daily = exit or significantly reduce exposure
MACD histogram flips decisively against position

take_profit.tp1: 25-33% at previous swing high / range high
take_profit.tp4_runner: Remainder at 2.0 or 2.618 extension with trailing stop
take_profit.td_exit: Also watch for opposite TD Sequential sell 9/13 on same timeframe as entry signal (Tone Vays)

risk_rules: Risk 1-2% of portfolio per trade, no exceptions
A+ setups (all signals aligned) get larger allocation; B setups (2-3 confluences) get smaller
Minimum R:R of 1:2, prefer 1:3 or better
NO leverage for swing trades (Tone Vays: leveraged crypto = gambling)
Portfolio allocation: 50-70% BTC/ETH core, 20-30% swing trades, 10-20% stablecoins for dips
DCA at key Fibonacci levels for core BTC positions rather than all-in
Avoid stacking correlated altcoin trades simultaneously
Hold swing trades for days to weeks — this is NOT day trading
Expect only 4-8 high-conviction swing trades per year (Tone Vays). Patience IS the edge.
btc_specific_notes: Round numbers (50k, 60k, 70k, 80k, 90k, 100k) are major psychological S/R
CME gaps tend to fill — mark them as tradeable levels
Stack Fibs from multiple timeframes — convergence zones are highest probability
If liquidity pool sits at the 0.618 Fib, that's the highest conviction buy zone

gold_day_trade.philosophy: Price action at structure levels makes the decision. VWAP provides the anchor. EMA 21 filters direction. Volume confirms intent.

vwap.notes: Institutional fair value anchor with +/-1σ and +/-2σ bands

volume.notes: Confirmation of intent — trigger candle volume must exceed 20-period SMA

pre_session_markup: Obvious swing highs/lows from last 2-3 sessions with multiple reactions

bias_rules.long: Price above VWAP AND above EMA 21
bias_rules.short: Price below VWAP AND below EMA 21
bias_rules.no_trade: Price between VWAP and EMA 21 (disagreement) — sit on hands
bias_rules.timing: Establish bias after first 15 minutes of session open

where: Marked support/resistance level aligned with bias direction

triggers.engulfing: Trigger candle body fully engulfs prior candle body, AT a level, volume above 20-period SMA
triggers.pin_bar: Long wick rejection off a level (wick >= 2x body). Wick pierces INTO the level and closes back beyond it
triggers.break_and_retest: Price breaks level decisively, pulls back to retest, entry on first confirmation candle at retest

entry_rules.execution: Enter on the CLOSE of the trigger candle, not before.

stop_placement.pin_bar: 1-2 ticks beyond the wick of the pin bar
stop_placement.engulfing: 1-2 ticks beyond the low (long) or high (short) of the engulfing candle

take_profit.tp1: 50% of position at 1.5R — move stop to breakeven on remainder
take_profit.tp2: 25% of position at 2R — trail stop on final portion
take_profit.tp3: 25% of position at 3R or next major level

exit_rules.minimum_rr: 1.5:1 — if nearest opposing level is closer than 1.5x your stop, skip the trade

risk_rules: Risk 1% of account per trade, no exceptions
If 2 losses, done for the day
No trading first 15 minutes of session open
No trading 30 min before/after major releases (CPI, FOMC, NFP)
No revenge trades — wait minimum 15 min after a stop-out

session_windows.primary: 8:00 AM - 11:00 AM ET (London/NY Overlap — maximum liquidity)
session_windows.secondary: 3:00 AM - 5:00 AM ET (London Open — sets daily direction)
session_windows.avoid: 1:30 PM - 4:00 PM ET (Gold often reverses or dies)
